items.caption: A line drawing of a heavy old anvil, rendered in a creative cold gradient style. the anvil, which is the central object in the image, is depicted with a handle on top and a flat base at the bottom. the drawing is outlined in a bright blue color, while the interior is filled with a gradient of yellow and green hues, giving the anvil a three-dimensional appearance. the background of the image is white, which contrasts with the vibrant colors of the anvil and highlights its form. the drawing is simple yet detailed, capturing the essence of the anvil's shape and structure.
